name: Rhythm Dance Workout: Hands-Free VR
summary: Welcome to our immersive Rhythm Dance Workout: Hands- Free VR application, where you can enhance your practice like never before. A rhythm-dance-inspired VR learning experience using hand-tracking only, designed for comfort and natural motion. No controllers. Just you.  Learn Rhythm dance with 3D tutors, nature scenes, slow motion, rewind & fast forward!  Introduce precision into your practice with our slow-motion feature. By touch the panda button, you can replay current pose in slow motion.
